title: Wrong Network
message_template: Please switch your wallet to Base Mainnet (Chain ID 8453), refresh, and retry mint.

title: Pending Tx
message_template: Your transaction is pending. Do not submit duplicates yet. Check explorer and wait for confirmation.

title: Reverted Tx
message_template: The transaction reverted. Common causes: phase not open, cap reached, insufficient ETH for gas.

title: Not Eligible
message_template: Your wallet is not in the current allowlist snapshot. Public mint opens at {public_start_utc}.

title: Scam Warning
message_template: Use only official links from pinned announcements. Never share seed phrases.

title: Reveal Timing
message_template: Metadata reveal is scheduled for {reveal_utc}. Until then, pre-reveal art is expected.

title: Overcharge Concern
message_template: On-chain total paid = mint price + gas. Gas is a network fee and not collected by us.

title: Service Degraded
message_template: We are investigating degraded mint performance. Next update in {minutes} minutes.
